data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for simple cancellation with a 24-hour notice, but there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that cancellations more than 24 hours ahead result in an automatic refund, there is no concrete API read or persisted state check that demonstrates this behavior in practice. Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied based on the available evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of simple cancellation with a 24-hour notice.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
